JAZZ NIGHT: Dave Fox Trio
events.description:
The Dave Fox Trio is a Modern Jazz Trio featuring original jazz
compositions and arrangements inspired by artists such as John Coltrane, Joe Henderson, Chick Corea, Steve Swallow, Charles Mingus, Thelonious Monk and Wayne Shorter. The group features internationally acclaimed bassist John Lockwood and innovative Boston area musicians and composers such as guitarist Phil Sargent and saxophonists Nicholas Brust and Bill Jones.

Dave Fox is an accomplished, versatile drummer and is currently a full-time member of The Gravel Project, Dan Rockett and The Guilty Party and
“AS3” along with Andrew Stern and Brad Barrett.

As a sideman for over two decades, he has performed with a diverse group of artists including Jerry Bergonzi, John Lockwood, Josh Smith, Dave Tronzo, Charles Neville, Stan Strickland, The Stompers and Tom Hambridge and The Rattlesnakes to name a few.

events.title: Stillwater
events.description: Stillwater is a bluegrass sextet founded in 2023 on the banks of the Stillwater River in Old Town, Maine. Stillwater features Trip Nickel (guitar), Yoni Musher (mandolin), Kiera Luu (double bass), George Horvat (fiddle), Jack Pasternak (dobro) and Noha Vaughn Jackson (banjo. Stillwater incorporates modern renditions of traditional American folk and bluegrass tunes with contemporary jamgrass, respectfully exploring their creative freedom within the wide world of improvisational music and songwriting.

events.title: Anthony da Costa
events.description: Anthony da Costa is a singer/songwriter whose new album 'The No Send Letter' explores themes of heartbreak, growth, and the importance of community during difficult times. A prodigy who won major folk festival competitions at age 16, he has toured internationally and shared stages with artists ranging from Loretta Lynn to Big Thief.
